intended_use: The device is a diagnostic imaging system that combines Positron Emission Tomography (PET) and X-ray Computed Tomography (CT) systems. This device is to be used by a trained health care professional t
intended_use_full: The device is a diagnostic imaging system that combines Positron Emission Tomography (PET) and X-ray Computed Tomography (CT) systems. This device is to be used by a trained health care professional to gather metabolic and functional information from the distribution of the radiopharmaceutical in the body for the assessment of metabolic and physiologic functions. This information can assist in the evaluation, detection, localization, diagnosis, staging, restaging, follow-up, therapeutic planning and therapeutic outcome assessment of (but not limited to) oncological, cardiovascular, neurological diseases and disorders. Additionally, this device can be operated independently as a whole body multi-slice CT scanner.
target_condition: Oncological, cardiovascular, neurological diseases and disorders
ground_truth: NEMA NU-2 phantom testing and comparison to OSEM and Gaussian filter reconstruction methods; clinical reference standard not explicitly stated
other_metrics: Contrast Recovery Coefficient (CRC), Background Variability (BGV), Contrast to Noise Ratio (CNR), SUVmean, SUVmax, tumor volume accuracy, Signal to Noise Ratio (SNR)
